pi_items.source: https://bbbc.broadinstitute.org/BBBC005 states images are 'Simulated HCS images were generated with the SIMCEP simulating platform'
ZIP file inspection - all 19,200 files use SIMCEPImages_ prefix, zero files use SIMULATION_ prefix

pi_items.metadata_value: setup_task.sh attempts to extract C25 (25-cell) variant
pi_items.verified_value: C25 does NOT exist in BBBC005_v1_images; available cell counts are [1-24, 27, 31, 35, 40, 44, 48, 53, 57, 61, 66, 70, 74, 78, 83, 87, 91, 96, 100]
pi_items.source: ZIP file analysis - examined cell count parameter across all 19,200 files

pi_items.verified_value: Verifier checks for case-insensitive matches of 'cell_id', 'area', 'neighbor'
pi_items.source: verifier.py lines 68-73 show relaxed column matching logic

privileged_info_summary: BBBC005 is a synthetic dataset of simulated cell monolayers with image dimensions of 696x520 pixels. The dataset contains simulated cell counts from 1 to 100 (with specific variants at 1-24, then 27, 31, 35, 40, 44, 48, 53, 57, 61, 66, 70, 74, 78, 83, 87, 91, 96, 100), enabling creation of images within the expected range [15-35]. Files are named following the pattern SIMCEPImages_<well>_C<count>_F<blur>_s<sample>_w<stain>.TIF. Critical finding: The setup_task.sh script contains a critical bug - it attempts to extract files using the nonexistent 'SIMULATION_' prefix and attempts to use the unavailable C25 variant, which will cause the task initialization to fail.
